title: PR Review Fix CI
summary: Review a pull request or branch, inspect CI failures, diagnose actionable issues, optionally patch, verify, and summarize with evidence.
author: COOLWHITE LLC

inputs.name: branch
inputs.description: Branch to review when no pull request is supplied.

inputs.name: base
inputs.description: Base branch or ref for comparison.

inputs.name: ci
inputs.description: CI system, check name, or log path to inspect.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.description: review for findings only, or fix when file edits are allowed.

compatibility.notes: Canonical v0.1.30 app for PR review, CI diagnosis, and optional patch work.
